description: Aha! provides product development software for roadmap planning, idea management, discovery, delivery, and related product team workflows. Its suite includes products such as Aha! Roadmaps, Develop, Ideas, Discovery, Whiteboards, Teamwork, and Knowledge.
summary: Aha! exposes a tenant-scoped REST API, an Aha! Develop GraphQL API, and publicly announces an MCP server; REST supports API key or OAuth 2.0 bearer auth, while the GraphQL API documents OAuth 2.0 bearer auth.
